steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The uncle says the hardest ___ of telling a story is finding the beginning. The blank needs a word meaning one component or aspect of a larger process.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Zone: a spatial area or region. A story doesn't have zones. ✗
  • Choice B — Melody: a musical tune. Unrelated to storytelling structure. ✗
  • Choice C — Element: a component or aspect of something larger. Finding the beginning is one element of the storytelling process. ✓
  • Choice D — Blob: a shapeless mass. Doesn't fit any sense of the sentence. ✗
That is the correct answer.
